assertions.title: ATLAS stays generation-compatible with the renamed active docs

steps.action: Check for broken references in ATLAS
steps.expected: All referenced files exist, no broken links
steps.observed: Found references to historical docs with 'cagent' in filenames (adr-0029-cagent-vsock-work-broker.md, state-report-2026-03-15-cagent-docs-landscape-audit.md, cagent-spec-and-implementation-guide.md) - all files verified to exist

assertions.title: State paths, ignore rules, and root docs agree on the hard cutover

steps.observed: Found .cogent/ with cogent.db, cogent-private.db, artifacts/, raw/, jobs/, transfers/, debriefs/, serve.json

steps.expected: cogent.db and cogent-private.db exist, old names absent
steps.observed: Database files exist with new names; cagent.db and cagent-private.db do not exist

steps.action: Check git ignore rules for runtime churn
steps.expected: Private DB sidecars and runtime directories ignored
steps.observed: All required paths ignored: cogent-private.db*, cogent.db-wal, cogent.db-shm, raw/, jobs/, transfers/, debriefs/

steps.expected: Public database is not ignored and is tracked
steps.observed: cogent.db is not ignored and is tracked in git

steps.action: Check root docs for cogent references
steps.observed: All root docs reference .cogent/cogent.db and .cogent/cogent-private.db correctly

steps.action: Check root docs for cagent references
steps.observed: No .cagent, cagent.db, or cagent-private.db references found
Found !.cogent/cogent.db and ignore rules for runtime files

assertions.title: Deprecated adapter purge is consistent across surfaces

steps.expected: supervisor.json does not exist and is not tracked
steps.observed: supervisor.json does not exist under .cogent/ and is not tracked in git
opencode.json and opencode.json.backup do not exist

steps.action: Search for deprecated adapter references in active surfaces
steps.expected: No functional references to codex, opencode, --codex-openai-bridge
steps.observed: Found only documentation comments in sandbox/src/actors/terminal.rs describing historical opencode integration - no functional code references
No deprecated adapter directory patterns found in .gitignore

steps.expected: No usage of deprecated adapter flags

frictions.description: ATLAS references to historical documents contain 'cagent' in filenames, which initially appeared as stale references but are actually legitimate references to intentionally preserved historical docs
frictions.resolution: Verified all referenced files exist - these are historical/archive documents that haven't been renamed per mission guidance

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all passed. ATLAS regenerates successfully without broken references. State paths, ignore rules, and root docs are fully aligned on .cogent/ and cogent.db naming. Deprecated adapters (codex, opencode, supervisor.json) are completely purged from active surfaces. Only documentation comments remain describing historical integration purposes.
